nasb.text: He shall lay his hand on the head of his offering and slay it at the doorway of the tent of meeting, and Aaron’s sons the priests shall sprinkle the blood around on the altar.

esv.text: And he shall lay his hand on the head of his offering and kill it at the entrance of the tent of meeting, and Aaron’s sons the priests shall throw the blood against the sides of the altar.

cnv.text: 他要按手在他的供物的頭上，在會幕門口宰殺牠；亞倫子孫作祭司的，要把血潑在祭壇的四周。

ccb.text: 献祭者要把手放在牛头上，在会幕门口宰牛。祭司——亚伦的子孙要把牛血洒在祭坛四周。
